text: World Cup 2026 is still far away, but the group chat is already choosing champions. What is the first prediction you might change later?

text: Every early World Cup prediction should come with one rule: we are allowed to change our minds after the draw. What is the first prediction you might change later?

text: There is always one team people ignore in June and suddenly fear by the knockout stage. What is the first prediction you might change later?

text: Hot take, football-only: Brazil will not win World Cup 2026. Too much attacking talent, not enough knockout calm. Convince me I am wrong. What is the strongest counterargument?

safety_note: 仅限足球讨论，发布前请人工审核。
